ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, flesh and skin, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Eau (39%), haricot vert (10%), épinard (10%), courgette (10%), 
oignon (8%), petit pois (5%), brocoli (5%), poireau (3%) carotte (3%), 
navet (2%), huile d'olive (2%), ail (2%), échalote (<1%), céleri branche(<1%), 
sel (<1%), laurier (<1%), thym (<1%), coriandre grain (<1%), fenouil 
grain (<1%), clou de girofle (<1%).
